notes: Desktop unit — not rack-mountable (dimensions 8.5 x 5.5 x 1.02 in, 1.2 lb). SD card slot (front-mounted, SD/SDHC/SDXC) omitted as it is a media slot, not a signal connector. Audio is embedded in SDI and HDMI as well as via the dedicated 3.5mm jacks. The 4-pin mini XLR DC power connector is described as latching with gold pins. USB-A port can supply 1A to connected storage devices. Source is the official AJA product page cross-checked against AJA's own manual on ManualsLib.

ports.name: HDMI In
ports.note: HDMI v1.4a, standard Type A, RGB or YCbCr

ports.name: HDMI Out
ports.note: HDMI v1.4a, standard Type A, RGB or YCbCr

ports.name: LAN
ports.note: 1GigE for network control and SMB recording

ports.name: USB
ports.note: USB 3.2 Gen1 (5Gb/s), front-mounted, for external storage media (exFAT/FAT32)

ports.name: USB Config
ports.note: Rear-mounted, dedicated for AJA eMini-Setup configuration utility

ports.name: DC In
ports.note: 12V DC, 4-pin mini XLR latching connector; included external supply is 100-240 VAC 50/60 Hz, 60W max
